privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a top-level course category named 'Life Sciences' (ID: LIFESCI) with description containing 'living organisms'. The existing course 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) must be moved into this category. A sub-category named 'Archived Life Sciences' (ID: LIFESCI_ARCHIVE) must be created as a child of Life Sciences and hidden (visible=0). All metadata claims match the task description exactly. The course data is synthetic, created during Moodle environment setup in setup_moodle.sh. The verifier checks for these exact values and requires BIO101 to be successfully moved for task success (65+ points with course_moved flag).
